name: Alan Carr
bio: Alan Carr is an English comedian, broadcaster and television personality from Weymouth who built his stand-up on the Manchester circuit before winning the BBC New Comedy Awards in 2001. His camp, conversational style carried over into hit television, including co-hosting The Friday Night Project and his long-running chat show Alan Carr: Chatty Man. He has toured extensively as a stand-up.

timeline.ev: Wins the BBC New Comedy Awards
Tooth Fairy Live tour and DVD
Hosts an episode of Live at the Apollo

accolades: City Life Best Newcomer of the Year (2001)
British Comedy Awards for his television work

bits.yt_title: Alan Carr Googles Himself | Live at the Apollo
